chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application NO.76 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection at flag-A 2. For hearing of main case. 07.07.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Raja Shahid Hussain Solangi, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Instant bail application has been preferred by applicant/ accused, namely Aijaz Ahmed s/O Haji Khan alias Hajan Solangi, seeks pre-arrest bail in crime NO. 92/2024, registered at Police station, Mithani District Nousharo Feroze for offence under section 302, 324, 337H(ii), 337F(i), 147, 148 PPC. Learned counsel for the applicant has contended that applicant is innocent and he has been falsely implicated by the complainant. Interim bail was granted to the applicant vide order dated 28.01.2025 thereafter notices have also been issued to the complainant and today matter was come up for confirmation. Learned counsel for the complainant has effected appearance and has furnished his affidavit of no objection for confirmation of the bail. In the light of the affidavit referred above, the interim bail earlier granted to the applicant, is hereby confirmed with same surety. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
